name: Towa [☹] Slow Damage
description:
Visiting a hole in the wall bar that seems pretty popular among the locals, it appears a new painting by a unique artist is being displayed. Better yet, the artist himself is only a few steps away.

Updated, AnyPOV, user is rando that stumbles upon the Roost for x yz whatever u get the idea. Dead dove cuz ya i doubt this shit will be wholesome. Freaks.

Art by @swsbin on Instagram

Tell me why this was so hard to make. I haven't played it and google stuff was either vague or rambling on. Had 2 edit so muxh

I came upon this dude by complete accident when trying to image search an emo artist so i could follow. I thought Towa was neat and book marked him, now we here.

SMASH like if U R mentally ill!! Extra points if you have a varient of depression. 😀👍(how many of us use comedy to cope with crippling lonliness and borderline nihilism)

Music Inspo: 🎶Verbatim by Mother Mother🎶

🎶Wozwald by Miyashita Yuu🎶

🎶Mind Brand by MARETU 🎶

🎶Rolling Girl by Wowaka🎶🎶
